title: stelis scutella
intro: Stelis scutella, also known as the shield orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stelis scutella include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Stelis scutella can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can then be used as a topical application or ingested as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
